2280530.name: Red Trigger Prologue Remastered
2280530.description:
Red Trigger Prologue Remastered is the prologue of Red Trigger, a First Person Shooter (FPS) Puzzle game, inspired by games like Portal, Antichamber, Superliminal, The Witness and more, but very much has its own identity. Compared to the original, it has been made from the ground up and features a ton of new content :

- New art direction
- New graphics and complete remodeling
- Improved and redesigned puzzles
- New story
- New game mechanics like a scanning visor
- Addition of collectibles in the form of audio logs
- Speedrunning tools
- And more!

The prologue is but a taste of what's to come in Red Trigger. The prologue lasts about an hour and tells the story of how Red took down the firewall and gained access to the mysterious digital world she will explore in the full game. It includes the main mechanic, a lot of puzzles, and one escape sequence.


In Red Trigger Prologue Remastered, the main mechanic revolves around you shooting red blocks called Red Triggers. When you shoot a Red Trigger, it expands, and when you shoot it back, it retracts.


However, you can only expand three Red Triggers at a time, so you must manage your energy wisely. You can either retract Red Triggers one at a time, or all at once. Be careful though, you don't want to do that while standing on an extended block over a deep, deep void below you!


The Red Triggers are used in many different ways like making platforms, blocking lasers, holding doors open, powering systems, propelling yourself, inputting codes and more!


You play as a computer virus called Red Trigger. Corrupt the computer system you're infiltrating! Beware, this won't be easy, as you'll need to do an escape sequence to return to safety as it crumbles!
2280530.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
